steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: The passage compares two speeds and then provides a reason for the difference: how biomechanical features affect top speed differently. The blank must express that the speed difference is the result of, or caused by, these feature differences.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content:
“Consequence” means a direct result or outcome. Placed in the sentence, “The difference is largely a consequence of the fact that...” expresses that the speed difference stems from the biomechanical differences.

The other choices fail: “objective” is a goal, “repudiation” is denial, and “explanation” is awkwardly phrased with “of.” That confirms A is correct.
